entry.data:
CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S
NORTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S
NORTHEAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS AROUND 70
NORTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH IN THE EVENING, BECOMING LIGHT AND VARIABLE

SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S
EAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
SOUTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH IN THE EVENING, BECOMING LIGHT AND VARIABLE

SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS AROUND 90
CHANCE OF RAIN 30 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN CLEARING
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S

MOSTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
CHANCE OF RAIN 30 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE MID 70S
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S
